status.wave_2: built and tested — npm publication in progress

products.name: Identity Engine SDK
products.description: Persistent identity, state, journal, and drift checks for agents that need continuity across sessions.

products.name: Confidence Gate MCP Server
products.description: Scores proposed agent actions before tools run and returns allow, review, or block decisions.

products.name: Multi-Voice Deliberation Framework
products.description: Builder, Skeptic, Evolver, and Guardian voices review decisions before committing an answer.

products.name: Agent Cost Router
products.description: Routes agent work to the cheapest capable model and logs routing decisions.

products.name: Goal Drift Monitor
products.description: Detects when long-running agents drift off task with session scoring and alerts.

products.name: Cognitive Memory MCP Server
products.description: Gives agents durable local memory with retrieval and context packing.

products.name: Agent Skill Marketplace Plugin
products.description: Lets agents discover, install, verify, and run trusted local skills.

products.name: Audit & Replay Logger
products.description: Records logged agent decisions, tool calls, and state changes for local audit replay.

products.name: Prompt Archaeology Tool
products.description: Runs probes to estimate behavioral constraints from observed agent responses.

products.name: Agent Test Harness
products.description: Provides repeatable tests for agent outputs, tool traces, budgets, and consistency.

wave_2_planned.name: Heartbeat & Continuity MCP Server
wave_2_planned.description: Keeps long-running agents alive on a paced interval, recovers stale running sessions, enforces unmet inbound-response obligations, and damps repetitive looping. Built Wave 2 product — npm publication in progress.

wave_2_planned.name: Recovery Assessment Engine
wave_2_planned.description: After an agent failure, interruption, or retraction, produces a structured assessment verdict and a recommendation for whether it is safe to resume. Built Wave 2 product — npm publication in progress.

wave_2_planned.name: Cognitive Heat Monitor
wave_2_planned.description: Read-only internal-state telemetry for agents: deterministic 0–1 signals blended from text and structured state, banded quiet / watch / elevated to flag rising load or risk before output degrades. Built Wave 2 product — npm publication in progress.

wave_2_planned.name: Contradiction Detector
wave_2_planned.description: Surfaces conflicting beliefs, goals, and statements with an open / resolved / dismissed lifecycle before they compound. Built Wave 2 product — npm publication in progress.

wave_2_planned.name: High-Fidelity Witness MCP Server
wave_2_planned.description: An independent, real-time observer that audits an agent's claims (preflight, advisory, report) and writes findings as receipts — distinct from a decision log, it does not replace the Audit & Replay Logger. Built Wave 2 product — npm publication in progress.

wave_2_planned.name: Receipt Discovery Layer
wave_2_planned.description: Discovers, correlates, and retrieves proof-of-action receipts across subsystems and sessions, making the whole suite's proof-trail queryable. Built Wave 2 product — npm publication in progress.

wave_2_planned.name: Agentic Regulation Engine
wave_2_planned.description: Advisory, read-only episode/pattern-level behavioral governance with efficacy feedback — recommends, it does not enforce, and never auto-certifies recovery. Sits above per-action gating. Built Wave 2 product — npm publication in progress.

wave_2_planned.name: Curiosity Protocol Controller
wave_2_planned.description: Gated, opt-in, human-stoppable controlled autonomy: activation gate, enforcement matrix, and lifecycle stop controls. Read-only by default; autonomous pursuit is not live and remains behind human approval. Built Wave 2 product — npm publication in progress.

wave_2_planned.name: Triad Protocol Framework
wave_2_planned.description: An evidentiary three-role decision audit — Witness, Adversary, Architect — that audits the receipts behind a committed claim. Composes with Multi-Voice Deliberation. Built Wave 2 product — npm publication in progress.

wave_2_planned.name: Plugin Runtime
wave_2_planned.description: Governed loading of third-party plugins/MCP servers — registration, capability authorization, handshake gatekeeper, lifecycle, and a forensic sink. Read-only by default; it governs plugins but does not guarantee their safety. Built Wave 2 product — npm publication in progress.

wave_2_planned.name: Webhook & Event Dormancy Manager
wave_2_planned.description: Dormant-by-default, fail-closed policy for external webhooks and event emitters — no external call fires unless explicitly activated and approved; queuing never sends. Built Wave 2 product — npm publication in progress.

wave_2_planned.name: Agent Maintenance Protocol
wave_2_planned.description: Structured agent self-maintenance with a read-only review phase, a typed human approval gate, then scoped execution that writes a change-log receipt. Built Wave 2 product — npm publication in progress.

agent_notes: Hosted beta, checkout, and hosted SaaS are not live.

The published, installable catalog is the `products` array (10 products, live on npm). The `wave_2_planned` array lists Wave 2 products that are BUILT and tested but not yet published to npm — present them as built, publishing soon; do not present them as installable until published.
CertaWorks products are decision-support tools and do not replace human judgment or production controls.
